title: viola alpina
intro: Viola alpina, also known as the Alpine Violet, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, Viola alpina is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
